articles.author: David Wright, Aditi Sangal, Tori B. Powell, Elise Hammond, Nomaan Merchant, Arlette Saenz, Eric Bradner, Arit John, Kaanita Iyer, Jack Clifton, Maureen Chowdhury, Ethan Cohen, Molly English, Edward-Isaac Dovere
articles.title: Democrats lay into each other in California debate as Indiana and Ohio hold primaries - CNN
articles.description: Seven candidates participated in CNN’s California gubernatorial primary debate. We also covered election results from Indiana and Ohio.
